# Pheo

Pheo adds governed human judgment to AI workflows that already exist.

Use it when an app, agent, model endpoint, trace, batch job, or business workflow produces output that needs human judgment before reuse.

Do not rebuild the workflow inside Pheo. Add Pheo at the review point, capture approve/edit/reject/escalate decisions with reasons, export the memory pack, then apply compiled judgment memory on the next similar cycle.

## Start Here

- Agent guide: `docs/agents.md`
- Human walkthrough: `docs/getting-started.md`
- Finance example: `examples/finance_exception/README.md`
- LangChain attach demo: `examples/langchain_attach/README.md`
- Copy-paste patterns: `patterns/`

## Core Loop

```text
add source material
approve review rules
observe workflow output
capture human judgment with reason
freeze release receipt
export preference data
apply judgment memory on next cycle
```

## Best First Command For Agents

```text
Read docs/agents.md. Add Pheo review and export to the existing workflow. Do not rebuild the app inside Pheo. Use memory= on the next cycle and export receipts, preference data, and cycle diff.
```

## Proof Script

```bash
python examples/finance_exception/run_preference_factory.py \
  --project /tmp/pheo-preference-factory \
  --out /tmp/pheo-preference-factory-pack
```

This is the shortest end-to-end check for observe -> review -> export -> apply memory.

## Integration Choices

- Existing Python function: `patterns/wrap-python-function.md`
- LangChain output: use `pheo.integrations.langchain.with_pheo_review(...)`; see `patterns/langchain-attach.md`
- LangGraph final node: use `pheo.integrations.langchain.pheo_review_node(...)` before business side effects
- OpenAI/OpenRouter-compatible endpoint: `patterns/openai-compatible-endpoint.md`
- LangSmith, W&B Weave, or Noveum traces: `patterns/import-traces.md`
- Coding-agent setup through MCP: `patterns/mcp-agent-checklist.md`

Pheo does not receive customer data by default and does not call a Pheo-owned model.

Pheo source is MIT-licensed. It owns review gates, receipts, preference data, memory packs, local custody, and the bundled compiled kernel runtime. The repository does not include a public reference implementation of scoring, branching, or methodology synthesis.
